sqlMap.select: select * from metaindex where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into metaindex(metaobjectno, structureno, name indextype seq ) values (#metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #name# #indextype# #seq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('metaindex') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select metaindexno, name, indextype, seq, metaobjectno, structureno from metaindex where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update metaindex set
name = #name# name = null indextype = #indextype# indextype = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from metaindex where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from metaindex where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select metaindexno, name, indextype, seq, metaobjectno, structureno from metaindex where metaindexno = #metaindexno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select metaindexno, metaobjectno, structureno, name, indextype from metaindex where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
